feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP EWM table /SCWM/AQUA need to remove entry category PDO
entry.content: SAP EWM table /SCWM/AQUA need to remove entry category PDO is present then it need remove no document no presesnt

entry.title: Stock Room Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear all,

SAP WM will disappear after 2027 in the S/4HANA world.

Stock Room Management is part of SAP WM but with less functionalities. It has the same coding and the same tables like SAP WM.

Furthermore Stock Room Management have the same transactions like SAP WM.

But how I make the difference in the system that I use Stock Room Management and not SAP WM?

Is there a customizing setting that I choose Stock Room Management and not SAP WM?

How I make the difference in the system?

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Christian

entry.title: NEW receiving BIN vs the GR-area bin
entry.content:
When creating the starter system and Dev in sAp s/4hana public cloud the GR-Area Bin is created and all inbound delivery after the GR go there.

Customer wants to name this bin something else. I create a new bin REC-AREA and assigned it to  storage type S910.

I removed the GR-AREA Bin.

Now when I do a goods receipt nothing happens. It will not do the GR.

It cant be this hard. What am I missing? Any help would be greatful

entry.title: How to use Revision Level to segregate inventory of a material and use accordingly in production ?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Our customer is using revision levels (material index) to track technical evolution of materials.

On S/4hana cloud public, we are wondering how to achieve this using the standard Revision Level function which does not seem to have any impact on any process (purchasing, production & planning, inventory receipts or shipments, stock management). Is it only an information that cannot be leveraged at any point?

We have considered using batches but this would require important changes for the new field creation and dislay on every single relevant areas/business objects. Also products that are not batch-managed cannot use this solution (e.g.: small screws).

For the record, I found this simliar question which is not very recent so I'm try anyway (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/how-can-we-differentiate-between-stock-on-basis-of-revision-level/qaq-p/12553152)

Thanks in advance for your inputs, thoughts or experiences.

Adrien

entry.title: FSM-EWM Integration
entry.content:
Hello Community!

I would like to know if there is an integration between SAP Field Service Management (FSM) and SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM). I would like to associate the bins stock in SAP EWM with the technicians' warehouse stock in SAP FSM,

 

I appreciate any documentation you can share with me!

Best Regards,

Dayanna González

 

 SAP Community SAP Field Service Management SAP Extended Warehouse Management SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: how to print handling units in custom physical inventory form in EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

Greetings!

In our project (S/4HANA Embedded EWM) we are developing the custom form for Physical inventory in EWM. But, we couldn't find the logic to print Handling units in the form. Can any one suggest the logic or any Function Module to print the handling units.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Sachin.

entry.title: Physical inventory in EWM for mass materials
entry.content:
How to create, process and post physical inventory docs for mass materials(more than 400) and more than 2000 line items(batches) in sap EWM?
Please suggest step by step process!

entry.title: EWM Performance issue due to growth of table /SCWM/STOCK_IW02
entry.content:
Hello EWM Experts,

In production environment, we noticed abnormal growth of SAP table /SCWM/STOCK_IW02, and found this SAP note below regarding it:

2019324 - General performance issues in EWM

We then tried to apply this note / tool in our quality environment, by scheduling this report /LIME/BACKGROUND_DELETE_EXEC as recommended in the note, to run daily in a rather busy system we have.

In most of the days when the job is running, we noticed related SM13 error as following:

Function Module        /SCWM/GM_UPDATE

Status                 Update was canceled

Report                 /SCWM/LHU_TO_UPDF23

Row                    310

Error details   Class:     /LIME/CORE Number:    134
Object is already locked: /LIME/E_RESERVE; parameters: /LIME/E_RESERVE
 /LIME/E_RESERVE /LIME/E_RESERVE

 

Therefore, we can't use this in our productive environment. 

We would like to know if anybody also faced this increase of /SCWM/STOCK_IW02 table and how do you resolve it? 

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards, 
Shiv

entry.title: Distribute Quantity in EWM Outbound Delivery Order
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I'm exploring some options to split an EWM Outbound Delivery Order item into multiple sub-items, and would like to try the "Distribute Quantity" function in the Outbound Delivery Order (see screenshot). However, when I try to execute this function I get the following error:

Item not relevant for quantity distribution - Message No. /SCWM/DELIVERY_UI087

I can't find any useful documentation which explains when an item is relevant for quantity distribution; hopefully someone in this community can help me out!

Thanks & regards,

Oliver Hahn

entry.title: Bin Structure and Template
entry.content:
I trying to create Bin structure and template but ending up in error like "Storage bin must not begin with a blank character" or template not correct.

I have the below Storage Type with  bins  Aisle is 01, Stack is A1 and A,B,C are bin level

01A1A
01A1B
01A1C
01B1A
01B1B
01B1C
01C1A
01C1B
01C1C
01D1A
01D1B
01D1C
02A1A
02A1B
02A1C
02B1A
02B1B
02B1C
02C1A
02C1B
02C1C
02D1A
02D1B
02D1C
02E1A
02E1B
02E1C
02G1A
02G1B
02G1C

Could you please help me in Bin structure and Template.

Regards,

Chand Basha.S

entry.title: Inbound delivery could not be distributed to wms
entry.content: EWM - Goods Movement MM (Materials Management)  I have checked all configuration.

entry.title: Why inbound delivery is not being distributed
Usage decision with new warehouse task for final put away
entry.content:
Hello All,

Inspection lot is created after goods receipt, warehouse task is created based on condition records.

User will confirm the warehouse task and final put away is done in Quarantine bin.

now our requirement is once Usage decision is done then new warehouse task needs to be create updating stock type and new bin which is standard storage type.

I tried to create follow-up action with 1010 WPT but its creating new Warehouse task but from Quarantine to another quarantine bin.

we have updated the product with Quarantine Put away control indicator.

Please advise.

entry.title: Hi , can i restrict no of deliveries according to wave capacity profile in sap ewm?
entry.content:
Hi All,

can i restrict no of deliveries according to wave capacity profile in sap ewm?

EWM - Delivery Processing

entry.title: ODM: Issue trying to Activate/Generate OEIT order component
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I have an issue with ODM tables. Add new custom fields (/1OM/ORDROEIT*) component OEIT of the structure /SCMB/ODM_ORI_EXT_STR.

It displayed an error "The structure of component OEIT could not be generated (DDIF_TABL_ACTIVATE) when I try to activate and on generate a warning about "unnecessary key fields" 

Actions:  Added the new fields using an append structure and activate/generate the order component, data type and data area.

Analysis:

  • I noticed that the field of the component OEIT “Date/Time Activ.”  never changed and the version logs was changed.
  • The not extra key fields exist in the structure /SCMB/ODM_ORI_EXT_STR
  • The version of the tables and structures were updated. 

New Plan:

  • Removed all the new custom fields.
  • Procced with the Activation/ Generation.
  • Same results and same issues.

Any ideas?

entry.title: EWM - is there any limit for WO and WT for deliveries in public cloud?
entry.content:
Is there any limit on how many WT and WO can be connected to the delivery? I have the same question how many WT can be in one WO?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SKIP warheouse order in RF
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am doing putaway with RF by selection queue INBOUND.

I have 10 warehouse order in the Inbound  some time user may require to skip WO but that functionality is not there or I need to activate.

I am able to skip warehouse task in warehouse order with F2 and F3. But I am unable to go to another warehouse order 

 

I can see the Skip warehouse order functionality during picking 

Could you please help me how to add the functionality.

entry.title: WM level customization for material
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

i have 2 material which is maintained under WM view,

here user is doing,

creating of planned order --->printing label--->declaration done against label.

once the material declared manually the movement will takes place at only once, but in another material the movement is taking place twice, one by user and other one by Batch.

i have a success case of material where movement taking place only once,

to comparing to the success case, i want to check the WM level customization done for material, which and all checks i needs to do?

entry.title: ARM Configuration in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi ,

We have an issue in ARM Customer returns. A return sales order is created with Follow-Up Activity 0001-Receive into plant and OBD is created. Using /SCWM/PRDI, GR is done in EWM. In ECC outbound delivery updated with movement type 657 and material document also posted with 657. Using MSR_INSPWH we have done material inspection with Inspection code: SA(OK) and Follow Up Activity: 0015-Transfer to Specified stock and Target Storage location: XXXX(Different one than the one in OBD), Stock type: Blank ie Unrestricted. As per process a new Delivery is created, here we have issue:

1)In this delivery, storage location in the line item is not the one provided XXXX during material inspection. System picked old storage location.

2)In this delivery, movement type 343 is used by system but in EWM stock in B1 ie Blocked for putaway.

Do we need to activate any BC sets or missing any configuration related to ARM in EWM. Please let us know.

entry.title: Auto packaging in outbound delivery through abap code
entry.content:
Hi, I have this requirement where in exit ZXLTOU02 I create an HU with BAPI_HU_CREATE and then assign this HU to the outbound delivery with BAPI_HU_CHANGE_HEADER.

I tried to pack the material of the outbound delivery with BAPI_HU_PACK in the same user exit ZXLTOU02. 

My problem here is that I can get all done but in the outbound delivery I have the HU with a packed material but not the one in the outbound delivery. I'ts like the material item is not linked to the outbound delivery.

Here 2 pics.

The first one with my HU and its material linked to it.

The second one showing that, the material of the outbound delivery remains unpacked even though the first pick shows other thing.

I have read that you can update the outbound delivery and assign the HU and it's content through WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE but I can not find where I should implement this.

Any idea is welcome
